applied_optimizations.name: Fused Triton kernel for Subtract+GlobalAvgPool+LogSumExp+GELU+ResidualAdd
applied_optimizations.description: Fused 5 operations (elementwise subtract, reduce mean, gelu, broadcast add) into a single Triton kernel. GEMM kept as PyTorch/rocBLAS since it's already optimal at 94% of runtime.

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile wrapper
attempted_but_failed.reason: torch.compile interferes with custom Triton kernel launch, causing zero output
attempted_but_failed.error: Pointer argument cannot be accessed from Triton (cpu tensor?)

notes: GEMM dominates at 94.3% of runtime - already optimal via rocBLAS
Fusion of remaining ops (subtract, mean, gelu, residual) gives modest 1.03x speedup
ROCm Triton requires manual tanh implementation - tl.libdevice.tanh is unavailable
BLOCK_SIZE must be power of 2 and >= dimension size
torch.compile should NOT wrap ModelNew when using custom Triton kernels
